title: Marico Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Marico Advisory Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Marico Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Marico Advisory Limited:
Marico Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
